creator: mux@qualys.com
text:
The definition of PT_READ_U has been ripped from sys/ptrace.h in
-CURRENT.  It is used in strace source to print available ptrace commands.
The patch encloses the line with #ifdef's.  The same patch has been sent
to strace-devel mailing list in the hope it will be integrated for next
release.

Fix: Note: the patch fixes a little typo in the same time (useful for -STABLE
boxes).
How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/devel/strace && make
